# Hermes GitHub Evolution Fusion Note

Status: preserved source material for APEX/Pgg RuntimeOS.

This directory was imported from the private repository `appleoppa/hermes-github-evolution`.

Key assets:
- `formulas/EVM_FORMULA.py`: EVM twelve-defect formula engine.
- `formulas/apex_v2_1_fixed.py`: APEX v2.3 formula.
- `cron_cycles/CRON_STATE_MACHINE_RULES.md`: historical state-machine rules; marked V1 historical, but contains useful gate lessons.
- `evolution-system.json`: GitHub evolution factory configuration and triple-gate description.
- `genes/`: evolution gene source material.

Boundary:
- This import is not itself runtime fusion.
- Runtime fusion still requires selected logic to be promoted into tested Hermes modules.
- EVM here means APEX evolution defect gate, not blockchain EVM optional skill.
